meaning: n.(尤指出生不满一个月的)婴儿
examples: With these sophisticated observational assessment and electro-physiological measures, we know that the neonate of only a few days is far more perceptive than previously suspected.
A female term neonate presented with generalized edema, heavy proteinuria and hyperlipidemia in the second week of life.
Conclusions Premature delivery is the main causes of neonate illness and death.
